name: Cold Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes.
2. Cook the potatoes in boiling salted water until tender. Drain, reserving 3/4 cup of potato water.
3. Dice the potatoes. Add oil and minced onion; toss gently.
4. In a small saucepan, bring the reserved potato water to a boil. Pour over the potatoes and onion.
5. Keep at room temperature for 2 to 3 hours.
6. Stir in vinegar, mustard, sugar, and dillseed. The potato salad will be creamy.
7. Serve at room temperature.
